Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CATHERINE BONNIOT's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Catherine Bonnoit's unopposed "motion to file cross-complaint" is granted.

Order signed.
